## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking)

## Test plan

- [ ] `bun test` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Docs updated if public API / schema changed
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths
- [ ] No new deps (or deps justified in the PR description)
